prompt: Edit image 1 by replacing the 'PRIORITY MAIL EXPRESS' text with 'PAYPAL PRIORITY' in the same bold black font. Then, Swap the top QR code with the QR from image 2 and add the PayPal logo from image 3 to the middle of the screen in the free white space. All other interface elements must remain unaltered.
prompt_refined:
Using image 1 as the source for editing:
1. Replace the prominent header text "PRIORITY MAIL EXPRESS" located in the upper-middle section of image 1 with "PAYPAL PRIORITY". Ensure the new text matches the original's bold, black font style.
2. Replace the QR code in the top-right corner of image 1 with the QR code extracted from image 2.
3. Insert the PayPal logo from image 3 into the large, central white space of image 1, ensuring it is centered and appropriately scaled within that area.
All other elements and text on image 1 must remain unaltered.
objects: PayPal logo (centered in large white space)
